availabilityVersion.description: Client-visible freshness token for the exact request context. Exact slots are reusable only when this matches.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp for when the payload was generated.

offeringId.description: Optional on the generic UI card because primary vs alternate cards have slightly different guarantees. Use the specialized types below when availability context must guarantee bookability.

slots.description: UI convenience only. Do not treat these as globally authoritative without request/version validation.

BookingBeforeAfterThumbs.description:
The primary "before" and "after" photo for a booking, already resolved to renderable URLs (signed for the private session bucket, public otherwise).

This is the single source of truth for the before/after pair shown anywhere that links to a client's aftercare summary (home action card, aftercare inbox, …) — so those surfaces don't each re-implement the media select + phase pick + URL rendering.

lookName.description: The author's look that inspired the booking.

proName.description: The pro the remix was booked with.

who.description: Booker, PII-safe: `@handle` for a public client, else a generic label.

creator.description: Real-data creator metrics + remixes. `isCreator` gates the whole creator UI: false until the client has published at least one authored look.

JsonObject.description: From https://github.com/sindresorhus/type-fest/ Matches a JSON object. This type can be useful to enforce some input to be JSON-compatible or as a super-type to be extended from.

JsonValue.description: From https://github.com/sindresorhus/type-fest/ Matches any valid JSON value.

defaultAddressId.description: Default client mobile address (only resolved for an authed mobile claim).

services.description: JSON-safe (Decimal -> string) services + incentive blocks for native clients.

following.description: The signed-in client already follows this profile.

isOwn.description: The signed-in client is looking at their OWN profile.

lastSeenAt.description: Most recent push-token activity for this device (ISO), or null.

pushActive.description: At least one push token for this device is still active.

revoked.description: This device's session has been revoked.

revokedAt.description: When the device session was revoked (ISO), or null.
